response.justification: Strong general engineering fundamentals with recent agentic AI exposure, but lacks the specific hard requirements for this executive CTO role: no demonstrated fintech or regulated-environment experience, unclear evidence of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people, and shallow production multi-agent AI background. Recent MCP/agentic work is promising but insufficient to offset these critical gaps, and the ongoing founder role suggests divided executive attention.
strengths: Real-time systems and high-performance infrastructure expertise, demonstrated through low-latency applications handling millions of requests per second
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent frameworks and MCP code generation, showing engagement with modern agentic AI tooling
Diverse full-stack technical depth across languages, databases, microservices, and DevOps infrastructure required for complex system design
concerns: No fintech or regulated financial environment experience, despite this being a core domain requirement for both architecture and governance decisions
Lack of demonstrated evidence for scaling and leading engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people—a hard requirement for the CTO role
Multi-agent AI production experience appears recent and shallow; resume shows framework contributions rather than end-to-end systems making material financial or operational decisions

key_factors.factor: Fintech domain and regulated environment experience
